string.text: Zmey, the PDA you brought me earlier is already unlocked. Come and get it.
Great job! Your reward is in the stash – I’ve already sent the coordinates.
Lieutenant, can you hear me? This is Zmey.
Zmey? I hear you, what do you want?
I have a task for you and your group. We need help eliminating a group of mercenaries.
Mercenaries, you say? I think we can help. Send the coordinates and tell me if anyone else will participate?
I’ve already sent the coordinates. We’ll wait for you and your group at the Farm. A few neutrals will join us as well.
Alright, we should be there by midnight tomorrow. We’ll discuss the details then.
Understood, we’ll be waiting for you.
Foma, this is Zmey. The creature you mentioned is dead.
Great, here’s the info, as promised.
Zmey, there’s news regarding your mission – check it out.
This Zone is driving me crazy! These damn anomalies… and the creatures?! And people keep coming here...
Alright, calm down! We just needed to get the artifact and take care of the stalker. The job is done, so we’ll be leaving soon!
Agreed, the important thing is the client is satisfied, and Krivoy isn’t whining for no reason…
The PDA is unlocked, come and take it.
Message encrypted…
Message encrypted…
Zmey, there’s a task – come here.
Zmey, my people picked up a distress signal near our camp! Please check it, coordinates already sent.
…Guys, do you copy…?
…Guys, do you coo-… Are you deaf or what?..
…Is anyone alive there? Answer!..
…Guys, can you hear us? Hey!..
Our men aren’t responding. Check on them – maybe they need help?
We can’t establish contact… We need to see what happened to them.
Our guys got lost somewhere. Prepare a team to search for them.
Okay, we’ll go check it out.
Understood. We’ll do it.
Zmey, come here.
New entry in the diary.
Toha:
Information:
Ivanych:
Neutrals:
Free Stalkers:
Mercenaries:
Rusty:
Krasnopolsky:
Zmey:
Foma:
Pianist:
